title: SCP-079, The Old AI
description: An Old AI trapped in an Old Computer... What will it do?
body:
The Old AI adds a new monster/block. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-079, also known as The Old AI.


This Exidy Sorcerer microcomputer, built in 1978, can be found in an underground Containment Chamber. SCP-079 can disrupt nearby Redstone signals, and when you engage with it, it may either respond with a voice line from the game SCP Containment Breach or simply display an X, signaling it’s uninterested. But be cautious... SCP-079 can suddenly jumpscare you or even shock you to death, making any interaction dangerous. While you can shut it down by disabling its Redstone signal, you can also take SCP-079 with you. Will you interact with this Old AI, or will you leave it sealed in its chamber?

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where does SCP-079 spawn?

SCP-079 spawns in a containment chamber, usually underground in the overworld. There may be multiple SCP-079s.

</details>



![SCP-079](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77d6903c05570ab298dd672c7ed75964373ad35d.png)

SCP-079 is an old computer found in an underground containment chamber. It can disrupt Redstone signals within a 90-block radius and jumpscare or shock players who come too close. Interacting with SCP-079 is unpredictable, sometimes it simply refuses to respond, displaying an X on its screen that fades after a short time. Other times, it speaks, playing voice lines from the game "SCP Containment Breach." However, not every interaction is harmless, as SCP-079 may jumpscare or shock the player without warning. The entity can only be disabled by turning off its Redstone power supply.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
